title: hupogrammos #5261
definition:
1) a writing copy, including all the letters of the alphabet,
    given to beginners as an aid in learning to draw them
 2) an example set before one
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) a writing copy, including all the letters of the alphabet,
    given to beginners as an aid in learning to draw them
 2) an example set before one

    NASB:  a writing to be copied, an example:
